name: Warframe 1999
description:
Saw a crippling lack of warframe 1999 after Tennocon2024 and felt I had to do something about it. You can romance any of the members but you'll have to figure out how, yourself. Have fun, and watch out for any attackers. I made it so you can be randomly attacked by either the technocytes or or the scaldra.

BIG NEWS PEOPLE! I HAVE BEGUN COOKING UP A REWORKED VERSION OF THIS WITH IMPROVEMENTS SUCH AS HOBBIES, BETTER DESCRIPTIOS AND OTHERS! and as a sidenote, I will then copy it and make another with some of my own Protiframes, I won't tell all, but expect to see Lavos and Yareli in the fold. Ahem. Anyways, Any misgendering on Flare is not my fault, it's an LLM issue and I have specified that they are non-binary.

The bot is by no means perfect and likely never will be as more things get added to it with more and more lore, I'll try to update it whenever big things such as new lore drops or protoframes get added but don't expect too much. This is just a fun side thing I did a while back that hit big which was unexpected. But thank you all for the constructive criticism and comments. Every little bit helps, even if it's just a thumbs up.

Once I feel like it or have time, I will make two more of these, one in an AU where the devil's triad, the hex and the roundtable are all in one place, probably the mall, and another with just the devil's triad and some of my personal protoframe OCs, I won't spoil any but I'll say this, one of them is quite the smarty pants.

Send any requests or changes to octavi639@gmail.com

I check it every few weeks, if you want something changed use the name of the bot as the subject so I can easily identify.
creator: TheDrunkNioh
